violations.text: (Milk) was observed held at (48) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of product Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

Classroom#5 refrigerator observed in poor repair.Observed ambient temperatures at 44DF. PIC informed. Facility not allowed to store any tcs food s in unit until repaired and/or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

Spray bottles of chemicals were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

Milk products was observed held at (47-49) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Milk product disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the classroom refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024
The signage is lacking a hand-washing sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
